example_reviews: rev_32: good pace. good match for content. 3x Daily check in to track mood.
rev_86: Very good app. I used it every day.
rev_180: I use the app to take a moment just to check in with myself, and it seems good for that.
rev_282: This is a very good app.It gives detailed information and diagnosis of hoe you feel and gives very good recommendation
rev_510: Very good to just stop and reflect on where I am during the day
rev_627: It has been a good two days
rev_835: Good tracker :) suprising results, recommend
rev_1017: It's a really good app
rev_1069: It's really good and I found out I'm severely depressed 😔
rev_1193: It is good to see your progress.
rev_1261: It is good if u wan to be counciouse of your self esteem. I'm good so no need for this, it was good to reflect my feeling and get an understanding of how well or bad I felt.
rev_1451: Enough, Helpful. I realised it's very good. Working process also better.
rev_1581: very good for tracking how I feel and see what triggers certain feelings
rev_1709: Good app..worth trying.
rev_1808: Its a really good app so far it always reminds me to check in so i highly recomend this app❤😇😞
rev_1860: The app is good to help with the expression of your feelings and it forces you to delve deeper into what you're feeling
rev_1900: A really good app that helps you keep in check
rev_2011: Good app for people who has desperate feel.
rev_2147: Been using it a couple of days now and so far so good. Keeps asking me how I am more than my own family does!

rev_2203: Moodpath is best if you're recovering, or getting worse. If your mood is stable, good or bad, then this app won't tell you much. I find it good for track my progress in recovering, though! If nothing else, the questions force me to think more about how I'm *actually* doing.
rev_2421: Really good overview of how you're doing and some helpful information and actions to try. I love it.
rev_2442: It's a good refer to point.
rev_2530: It's a good app to work with
rev_2567: Pretty good so far, kinda makes you feel nice just reflecting on your feelings
rev_2727: Very good and helpful to me personally
rev_2844: Good prompts for self reflection
rev_2906: Great, it's very helpful to write down what I'm feeling good or bad.
rev_2941: Its kinda helping. Its good to log how i feel
rev_82: I like this app so far , I got a few days ago. It's helping me understand things about myself that has been hard to explain.
rev_204: I like mindDoc. it's almost like someone cares about you
rev_287: So many helpful resources for managing my anxiety and depression. I really like that I can track my moods to better understand my cycles.
rev_445: I really like the question I have to answer all over the day and sometimes it keeps me calm. I really like it
rev_524: The questions help me to see what is really unhelpful in my life. I like getting reports

rev_785: I am using the app since over a year now as a mood tracker and diary. You can export all data to an excel sheet. Much later I discovered all the other options like meditations which are really nice with long breaks and for different topics, sleeping, fear, sadness. There are plenty. Also a lot of background information about depression and emotions and how to deal with them. I really really like this app and fully recommend it.

rev_1108: I really enjoy having the ability to see any improvement and it helps me to not neglect certain aspects of my health. I also like being able to send a report to my doctor as it helps figure out if I need a change of treatment or meds.
rev_1243: I like it, let's me think about how I'm feeling and why.

rev_1385: I recommend this app for anyone who is struggling. The tracking system is great and intuitive. I like that it reaches out and makes you feel not alone and lastly, I like that it helps you determine if you need to take the next step and talk to a therapist.
rev_1668: it's like my own personal phone journal.

rev_1700: Super special app..you can keep analyzing yourself between therapist appointment or you can get your own therapist through modepath.. extremely Handy to have. For patients, therapists or self-help like how I got started on it..my mom even likes that I'm using this
rev_1831: Love the questions daily and insight that helps me focus on what my day is like. Learning as well about my condition is very helpful. Wonderful app.
rev_1904: Its feelings like connected
rev_2027: I really like the app, with its questions it started to make me feel realize what might be wrong with me and all ^^
rev_2130: very helpful to look into my mood and get to know why i feel like that
rev_2266: I like it a lot it has helped me reflecting on my moods and how I feel.

rev_2434: It's very helpful. It analyzes your behavior and gives you reports on it. It feels like your talking to someone else. It feels like your venting your emotions to someone. I would recommend this app for anyone wondering if they have depression.
rev_2518: this app can give you a place where you can contemplates what you feel daily
rev_2544: I really like da app
rev_2577: Makes me talk about my feelings and I feel like I can express them better.
rev_2640: Moodpath has saved me! It asks me questions, checks in with me, it feels like a helper. I've put work and found time to better myself both emotionally and physically. Thank you!

rev_2790: Weather or not this app give a good diagnosis. It asks the right questions to help you feel a little better. Also provides you with information on the why you feel the way you do, and for me personally, it made me feel less weird about the i feel.
rev_2915: This has helped me I like how I can talk and can reach out for help
rev_2997: It is helping me to understand my mood and why I'm feeling like this.
rev_169: It is an amazing app. It is extremely helpful and insightful if you really try, and you stick with it.
rev_934: Amazing! It's helping me a lot
rev_992: Amazing. It inspired me to go get treatment

rev_1416: It's an amazing app to help track your well being, although Im not sure if this is actually a professional app I love how I can track my well being and learn more about what I struggle with and how to help myself I would totally recommend it to others!
rev_1618: this app is amazing! I love all the features so much. I especially like the courses. I recommend it to all
rev_1884: This app is amazing. It helped me gain insight into myself.
rev_2122: Amazing app really
rev_2263: Amazing app that befriends me and helps me in feeling so much better. Thanks so much for making this app.
rev_2638: Amazing use of an app

rev_52: I just love this app, its so professional. it was recommended by my doctor, I find it really helpful to find the focus among the many feelings and thoughts, I enjoy the exercises a lot, they are really useful and clear, and I also love the daily insights and short reads. I highly recommend!
rev_263: I love this app its so helpful and informationally even the free part
rev_507: Its amazing to get feelings out and u can use a finger print so it can be privite only for you i love this app
rev_708: This app is very helpful and informative. Gives me a real chance to express my feelings. I love this app. I can express myself without being inside an office.
rev_819: I love this app, they are amazing and very helpful I have been with them for years and highly RECOMMEND
rev_952: Love this app , the results every 2 weeks are so informative and really put a perspective on many things and you can easily share with your therapist or Dr ! Thank you !
rev_1336: I love this app so much. It's so non-intrusive..and doesn't make me feel anxious about the questions or their answers.Thank u so much for this
rev_1569: I love the ability to reflect and see how my mood is changing, I love that I can see what areas I need to work on
rev_1621: Love this app. Keeps track of my feelings and gets me to think about certain questions and how I feel about the answers
rev_1819: Great user experience. I love that this app gently reminds me to keep tabs on my mental well-being, and that it changes up the questions every time.
rev_1950: I love this app. It helps me so much!
rev_2060: I love the app, helps me understand what i'm feeling
rev_2204: I love this app, it has helped me to understand how I am going through this crisis and what csn I improve to feel better
rev_2282: I find it very helpful for me and I think this is one of the best app that I ever use. Absolutely love it.
rev_2344: I love this app. I use the free parts to the app and just being able to put my feelings down in an app that will help me see what I can discuss with a professional is amazing!
rev_2432: Absolutely love this app. I look forward to reading and answering my questions everyday.
rev_2579: Helpful app. Love it
rev_2702: I love this app. It helps me with my moods, and figure out what I'm actually feeling. I love the questions it asks, how it makes you think about what you've been feeling.
rev_2885: I love this app because it has helped me to know what I feel.
groups.notes: Removed over a 100 reviews whose main focus was pricing/paywall complaints, technical reliability issues, or feature/usability requests rather than overall satisfaction and praise. Kept all remaining review_ids in the group and reduced example_reviews from 497 to 80 (about 16.1% of the original group), for better readability. They were the most important of the multiple reviews.'.
